name: Simba Cat Canned Cat Food Chunkies – Lamb 415g
description: Featuring tender meaty chunks that cats love, this appetising recipe delivers a satisfying texture and rich flavour to encourage a healthy appetite. Lamb is a natural source of protein that helps support muscle maintenance, energy levels, and overall vitality. Crafted to provide balanced nutrition in every serving, Simba Cat Chunkies Lamb is an ideal choice for everyday feeding and suitable for adult cats of all breeds. Key Benefits Complete and balanced wet food for adult cats Made with quality lamb for a rich, meaty flavour Source of protein to support muscle maintenance Tender chunkies texture for an enjoyable eating experience Supports daily health and vitality Highly palatable recipe for picky eaters Suitable for everyday feeding Convenient canned format Feeding Guide Serve according to your cat’s weight, age, and activity level. Always provide fresh, clean drinking water. Storage Store in a cool, dry place. Once opened, refrigerate and consume within 48 hours. Size: 415g
